index_about_text: Sagile Studios is a company founded by Miles Deka in 2025, with roots going back to 2020. The company distributes webcomics, books and related content to its audience. Currently there is only one member, but more updates about the company's future are coming. It was initially registered through Miles Deka's webcomic "Kamai SEN", and the brand also owns the founder's books. In the near future it will continue producing and publishing books, webcomics, animations...
index_foundation_text: The foundation took place in 2024, the idea came from Miles Deka, starting as a draft. The intention was for the company, as it is today, to be a studio for animations, comics, and books, among others. Works are distributed in various formats; on our site you can read the webcomic. We update every day, getting better and better. If someone gives a valid suggestion, we will analyze it and discuss the case.
index_works_text: Miles Deka's works are available on the site, you can buy from us or from our partners. Currently there are only six works available on the site. In the future, Miles Deka may create more of these works as soon as possible.
index_ideas_text: We have a great desire to be a large company, create video games and even work with films and motion capture games. There are still many ideas to show the public.
index_social_text: You can follow us on Instagram, YouTube and others.
index_news1_desc: Chapter 2 now available with new scenes and development.
index_news2_desc: New artwork and story adjustments have been added.
index_news3_desc: Visual improvements and new AAA interface implemented.
books_catalog_sub: Get ready for a long adventure of fantasy and science fiction, fully enjoy our stories.
games_desc: Eclipse-7 aims to bring retro, classic, and some modern games to the platform. The goal is to entertain users with our utilities and keep them engaged on the platform. We update every day, updates are automatic. Eclipse-7 is a future console with great potential to be one of the best ever created, it will accept indie games and more.
games_note: Enjoy the selected version, as new updates will arrive soon.
comics_sub: An adventure awaits you, our comic books will transform your leisure into something exploratory and adventurous.
about_text: Sagile Studios is a company founded by Miles Deka. It brings games, animations, comics and suggestions for new works (just a future idea). Kamai SEN is a comic created by Miles Deka and available under the Sagile Studios brand, and other titles are also by the same author. Soundtracks and other elements are also Sagile Studios content. There is still much to explore along the way. Sagile Studios will soon be officially founded in person. Ideas and suggestions are welcome to our team. Thank you for your attention and participation in this prototype site.
news_post1_status: Not yet available, expected this month.
